_meta.description: Explicit dependency graph for Koda data banks. Use when you prefer central dependency declaration instead of (or in addition to) per-bank dependsOn in bank_registry. Enables boot-time validation and stable load ordering.

categories._comment: Category-level dependencies — strictly acyclic, respecting loadOrder DAG: manifest → schemas → normalizers → routing → operators → semantics → scope → retrieval → formatting → dictionaries → lexicons → parsers → intent_patterns → microcopy → overlays → prompts → policies → fallbacks → quality → triggers → ambiguity → probes → templates → tests.

cases.assert: category dependencies do not require later categories
